citation: Arch MI Borrower-Paid Monthly Non-Refundable Annualized BPMI Rate Card (MCUS-B0283B-AMI, effective 2026-02-09), row [FICO 700-719 x LTV 95.01-97] -> 0.0079 (worst-cell rate; coincides with pmi_capped_fallback)
comment: Hand-calc: fico=710, ltv=Decimal('0.96') -> row [fico_min=700, fico_max=719, ltv_min=0.95, ltv_max=0.97] -> annual_rate=0.0079. Reason tag: PMI-RATE-ESTIMATED-MGIC-95-97-700-719.
